title: Connect emails containing Contact Names in Body to Contacts

posts.author: RoseM (Rose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

How do I connect an email containing a client’s information in the body to the client’s account?

Quickbooks sent us an email about a payment received by John Smith and even has his email in the paragraph. How can I automated emails like containing names to connect to their respected contacts?

I don’t want to extract from all emails, just a few that send relevant client information.
